tr.th: Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us

tr.td: The patient shows elevated HbA1c, indicating suboptimal long-term glycemic control, suggestive of prediabetes or diabetes. However, the current blood glucose is low, which may reflect recent hypoglycemia or fasting. Renal and electrolyte parameters are within normal limits. Clinical correlation and further evaluation of glycemic management are recommended.

text.div: Provenance for SYNDERAI Synthetic Example Data Resource
Laboratory: Laboratoire Central Européenne, 1000 Brussels, Belgium
